---
title: Sophie
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779805536/sophiehowlsmovingcastle_lbfacg.png
description: Sophie du château ambulant
categories: [fanart]
date: 2025-11-26
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779805536/sophiehowlsmovingcastle_lbfacg.png)
